name: Honey Barbecued Chicken-NHB
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken in a single layer in a large baking dish.
2. Sprinkle with salt and pepper to taste.
3. In a medium bowl, combine remaining ingredients; mix well.
4. Pour the mixture over the chicken.
5. Bake at 375°F for 30 minutes.
6. Turn pieces and bake an additional 20 minutes, or until glazed and thoroughly cooked.
